signals.raw:
Solana Spot ETFs Record $5.04M Net Inflows on April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs saw $5.04M in net inflows today, following $5.36M the prior day, with cumulative assets at $835M, indicating sustained institutional demand that could bolster price support and move prediction markets on adoption bets.[6]
